title: Token Spike Alert with Drill-Down
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: LLM Token Efficiency
description: Interactive Chart.js time series with click-to-drill-down panels that decompose a token spike by feature, user, and prompt template.

learningObjectives: Deconstruct a token spike using drill-down analysis to identify the contributing feature, user, or template responsible.

pedagogical.teachingStrategy: Click-driven decomposition with three breakdown dimensions
keyQuestions: Which feature is responsible for the spike?
Within that feature, which user dominates?
Within that user, which prompt template fires the most tokens?
commonMisconceptions: All users contribute equally to a spike — they almost never do.
An alert at the global level tells you the cause — it tells you only the symptom.
